title: Job Opening Teacher at Mumbai University

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Mumbai University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mumbai University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About Mumbai University:
Mumbai University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mumbai University!
